title: Gorros' Fen
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Gorros' Fen''' was a massive, tubelike worm that extended from the bowels of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] it was grown into. It was used to gather nutrients from a [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] mantle to power the ship, and on some occasions, even deploy warriors. The tube was many times longer than the worldship itself.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-09-30 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
